title: GRIEF SUPPORT GATHERINGS - 211info
text: THE GRIEF HOUSE GRIEF SUPPORT GATHERINGS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-person and virtual community-led grief support events for different types of loss including the death of a loved one, job loss, pet loss, divorce or estrangement, and other life changes. 7906 N Fessenden Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older who are experiencing grief Hours: Hours vary by event Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or email for more information FEES: Fees vary by event. Most events are $35-$45 with a self-declared sliding scale option. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: In-person: City of Portland Virtual: State of Oregon Services: General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Pet Loss Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE GRIEF HOUSE
